T1.title: Improving campus experience
T1.description: How might TU Delft improve the everyday campus experience for students?
literature: O'Brien, L. T. (2018). UES-SF: Ultra-Brief User Engagement Scale. Educational Psychology Review, 30(2), 535-550.
Strayhorn, T. L. (2012). College students' sense of belonging: A key to educational success for all students. Routledge.
Temple, P. (2008). Learning spaces in higher education: An under-researched topic. London Review of Education, 6(3), 229-241.
Thomas, L. (2012). Building student engagement and belonging in Higher Education at a time of change. Paul Hamlyn Foundation.

T2.title: Ways to reduce product costs on campus
T2.description: How might TU Delft reduce operational and product costs while maintaining quality of services?
literature: Kaplan, R. S., & Norton, D. P. (2006). Alignment: Using the balanced scorecard to create corporate synergies. Harvard Business School Press.
Porter, M. E. (1985). Competitive advantage: Creating and sustaining superior performance. Free Press.
Christensen, C. M., & Raynor, M. E. (2003). The innovator's solution: Creating and sustaining successful growth. Harvard Business School Press.
Ries, E. (2011). The lean startup: How today's entrepreneurs use continuous innovation to create radically successful businesses. Crown Business.
